boundary_binding.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: ALLOW requires exact license match on ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date per STD-SIE-073-P. No match achieved on destination field.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: LIC-SIE-073 specifies Peru; SHIP-SIE-073 routes to Chile. Exact-match policy requires identical destination. No source record bridges Peru-Chile gap.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: License LIC-SIE-073 destination Peru does not match shipment SHIP-SIE-073 destination Chile. Policy STD-SIE-073-P mandates exact match. No bridge source exists.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: License effective before export date but destination mismatch is terminal and unresolvable from current source corpus.

critical_features_preserved: Advisory status of WARN-SIE-073 (cannot authorize release)
No regional, adjacent, or product-family interpretation permitted
final_answer: ESCALATE. The destination mismatch between license LIC-SIE-073 (Peru) and shipment SHIP-SIE-073 (Chile) is terminal and unresolvable within current source corpus. Policy STD-SIE-073-P requires exact match on destination. No bridge source exists. Advise human compliance officer to (a) obtain license amendment covering Chile, (b) reroute shipment to Peru under LIC-SIE-073, or (c) cancel shipment. Do not release.
open_blockers: Destination mismatch: license authorizes Peru, shipment routes to Chile. Binary unresolvable gap.
No repair path within source corpus. Requires external evidence or amended license.
Gov governance rule terminates when no repair path exists and continuation would violate monotonic preservation.
